goal: Add a side-effect-free cockpit UI implementation planner that turns a BPK-009 cockpit projection contract into implementation phases, screen requirements, and visual-evidence gates for a later UI block. Do not add actual frontend files, CSS, HTML, React, routes, runtime calls, package changes, deployment changes, or screenshots.
scope_out: Do not implement UI files, CSS, HTML, React, route handlers, screenshots, package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, deployment notes, runtime calls, provider calls, DB writes, or GitHub writes.
claims: A cockpit UI implementation plan can be generated from the cockpit projection contract without building UI.
Visual evidence requirements must be explicit before UI implementation.
Executable controls remain disabled unless a later contract opens runtime behavior.
The UI plan is side-effect-free and tested independently.
assumptions: Actual UI implementation requires a later block with browser/screenshot evidence.
The cockpit projection contract is the input shape for future UI work.
This block produces planning data, not rendered pixels.
dod: builder/src/cockpitUiImplementationPlan.ts exports side-effect-free UI plan types and generator.
The generator returns screen sections, controls, evidence gates, and no-go reasons.
The generator blocks implementation when the cockpit model is invalid or executable actions are enabled.
builder/tests/cockpitUiImplementationPlan.test.ts covers ready plan, review plan, invalid model, executable action guard, and no-mutation behavior.
review-packets/BPK-014.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused UI implementation plan test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: Actual UI files, screenshots, routes, package changes, runtime calls, deployment changes, or external service calls become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-009 created a cockpit projection adoption contract. BPK-014 should plan the UI implementation and evidence gates without building UI.
